learning_outcomes:
Architectural Studies 1. Major Programme: At the end of the course of
studies, students will have acquired : (1) skills to design the built
environment well and appropriately; (2) the capacity of knowledge in
humanities, technologies and professional practice of architecture and
construction; (3) innovative and critical thinking in
both the use of knowledge and the application of design skills; (4) a commitment to social responsibility
and professional ethics.
